lessons.title: Customs Union — Articles 28 to 30 TFEU
lessons.description: The foundation of free movement of goods is the customs union, established by Articles 28 to 32 TFEU. The customs union has two components.

lessons.title: Article 110 TFEU — Internal Taxation, Discrimination and Protection
lessons.description: Article 110 operates in a different area from Article 30 — it is not concerned with charges imposed at the border, but with fiscal systems applied internally within a member state that nevertheless distort competition between dome...

lessons.title: Articles 34 and 35 — MEQRs, Dassonville, Cassis and Keck
lessons.description: Article 34 prohibits quantitative restrictions on imports and all measures having equivalent effect between member states. Article 35 applies the same prohibition to exports.

lessons.title: Article 36 Justifications and Proportionality
lessons.description: Article 36 is the safety valve of the free movement of goods regime — it acknowledges that the elimination of trade barriers is not an absolute value and that member states retain legitimate interests that may sometimes conflict w...
